→ — Sorry for everyone using this chatbot but I'm no longer updating on this bot because I'm burnt out from the lack of views/chats on my other accounts and don't feel like posting any at the moment so don't expect any updates from this, I am terribly sorry and I hope you all can enjoy it while it's kind of shit :( — ←
